articles.title: Mangaluru’s Wenlock Hospital sets up 10-bed special unit to treat heatstroke victims - Deccan Herald
articles.full_text:
Mangaluru’s Wenlock Hospital sets up 10-bed special unit to treat heatstroke victims
According to the experts at the Wenlock hospital, if symptoms such as elevated body temperature, confusion, or loss of consciousness are noticed, immediate medical assistance should be sought by dialing the emergency helpline (108).
